brush_hair.action_anchor: A person uses a brush to groom their hair.

catch.action_anchor: Person receives an object with hands.

chew.action_anchor: Person moves jaw repeatedly to grind substance in mouth.
motion_phases: Mouth opens or food is placed in
Jaw moves rhythmically up and down
disambiguation: Repetitive jaw motion without speech lip movements
Focus on jaw area rather than hand-to-mouth actions

clap.action_anchor: Hands come together rapidly to produce a clapping sound.
motion_phases: hands meet with a quick impact
disambiguation: waving shows lateral hand motion without contact
rubbing hands involves continuous sliding, not impact

climb.action_anchor: A person ascends a vertical or inclined surface using limbs.
motion_phases: Upward pull or push with alternating limbs.
Stabilization in a new higher position.
disambiguation: sustained contact with surface during ascent

climb_stairs.action_anchor: Person ascends a staircase by stepping upward.
disambiguation: Structured steps distinguish from flat walking

dive.action_anchor: A person jumps headfirst into water.

draw_sword.action_anchor: A person pulls a sword from a scabbard.
motion_phases: Hand reaches toward sword handle on scabbard.
Hand grips handle and pulls sword upward or outward.
Sword blade fully emerges from scabbard.
disambiguation: Scabbard is visibly attached to person's belt or body.
Motion is a controlled pull, not a swing or slash.

dribble.action_anchor: A person bounces a ball on the ground with their hands.
motion_phases: Ball held in hands above ground
Ball pushed downward and impacts ground
Ball rebounds and is received by hands
disambiguation: Contact made with hands, not feet
Ball bounces back to hands after ground impact

drink.action_anchor: Person lifts a drinking vessel to mouth and ingests liquid.
motion_phases: Head tilts as liquid is consumed.
disambiguation: Container is used for liquid ingestion.
Motion involves tilting the vessel to mouth.

fall_floor.action_anchor: A person falls and impacts the floor.

flic_flac.action_anchor: A person performs a back handspring.
motion_phases: Hands contact ground as legs swing overhead
Feet land and body returns upright
disambiguation: Continuous backward flip with arm propulsion

handstand.action_anchor: A person balances upside down on their hands.
motion_phases: Hands placed on ground with feet on floor.
Legs kick upward, inverting the body.
Body held vertically with arms extended.
disambiguation: Primary support on hands, not head or feet.

hug.action_anchor: Two individuals embrace by wrapping arms around each other's torso.

jump.action_anchor: A person propels upward from the ground.
motion_phases: Feet push off, body becomes airborne.
disambiguation: Vertical motion distinguishes from horizontal runs.

kiss.action_anchor: Two individuals press their lips together.

pullup.action_anchor: A person pulls their body upward on a horizontal bar.
motion_phases: Pulling upward until chin clears bar
disambiguation: Overhand grip on a fixed bar

punch.action_anchor: A person extends arm with closed fist to strike.
motion_phases: Arm draws back with clenched fist.

push.action_anchor: A person applies force to move an object away.
disambiguation: Movement directed outward from the body
Lack of backward or pulling motion

ride_horse.action_anchor: Rider sits on horse and directs its motion.
motion_phases: Horse walks or trots with rider
disambiguation: Rider maintains seated position on horse

shake_hands.action_anchor: Two individuals clasp hands and move them up and down.
motion_phases: Hands meet and form a firm grip.
Arms shake in a vertical motion.

shoot_bow.action_anchor: A person shoots an arrow from a bow.
disambiguation: bow and arrow are visibly present
drawing and releasing motion involves both hands on bow

situp.action_anchor: Person lies on back and raises torso to a sitting position.
motion_phases: Lie flat on back with legs bent
disambiguation: Back lifts completely unlike in crunch

stand.action_anchor: Person transitions to an upright stance.
motion_phases: Person is in a lower position.
Person shifts weight and extends legs upward.
Person stabilizes in a full-height posture.
disambiguation: Movement culminates in an upright, stationary pose.
Differentiated from sitting by upward torso trajectory.
No ball or bat in scene

sword_exercise.action_anchor: A person practices controlled sword movements.
motion_phases: Assume a starting stance with sword

throw.action_anchor: A person swings their arm to propel an object forward.
motion_phases: arm accelerates forward and releases object

turn.action_anchor: A person rotates their body to change facing direction.
motion_phases: Body faces initial direction in stable stance.
Weight shifts as torso and hips pivot.
Feet realign to settle facing new direction.
disambiguation: Slower, controlled rotation unlike rapid spins.
Full body involvement distinguishes from head-only turns.

walk.action_anchor: A person moves forward by alternating steps with one foot always on the ground.

wave.action_anchor: Hand moves side to side in a repetitive gesture.
